info.title: Dune API
info.description: Dune Analytics API for executing SQL queries on blockchain data, managing queries, uploading datasets, and monitoring materialized views and pipelines. Provides programmatic access to the same data powering Dune dashboards.

post.description: Execute a saved query by ID. Returns an execution_id for tracking.

get.description: Check the status of a query execution.
Get the result of a specific execution.

parameters.name: allow_partial_results
parameters.description: Enable returning partial results for very large datasets.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: SQL WHERE-like expression to filter results.

get.description: Get the result of a specific execution in CSV format.

parameters.name: allow_partial_results
parameters.description: Enable returning partial results for very large datasets.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: SQL WHERE-like expression to filter results.

get.description: Returns the latest execution result of a query (does not trigger execution).

parameters.name: allow_partial_results
parameters.description: Enable returning partial results for very large datasets.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: SQL WHERE-like expression to filter results.

get.summary: Get Latest Query Result as CSV
get.description: Returns the latest execution result of a query in CSV format.

parameters.name: allow_partial_results
parameters.description: Enable returning partial results for very large datasets.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: SQL WHERE-like expression to filter results.

post.description: Execute raw SQL directly without a saved query.

get.description: Get details of a saved query.

patch.description: Update a saved query's SQL, name, description, etc.

get.description: List queries owned by the account.

post.description: Upload a CSV file to create a queryable table.
Insert data into an existing table. Accepts CSV or NDJSON.
Remove all data from a table while preserving schema.
